case_title: JACOB DEQUIS VS. ELIA N CARMELINO SANCHEZ BONILLA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT BONILLA INFORMING COURT OF NEW ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT BONILLA, ELIA N CARMELINO SANCHEZ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2019 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DEQUIS, JACOB AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA, ELIA N CARMELINO SANCHEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEQUIS, JACOB AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA, ELIA N CARMELINO SANCHEZ

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO MAIL RECEPTACLE - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA, ELIA N CARMELINO SANCHEZ

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEQUIS, JACOB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BONILLA, ELIA N CARMELINO SANCHEZ $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 27, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
